task_description: Implement all 5 tasks for the SIA project's Stabilize & Package phase: (1) family-specific concept selectivity with differentiated policies, (2) pyproject.toml and Python version documentation with tests, (3) deep analysis documentation of concept_engine and eval system, (4) run remaining eval runners and capture results, (5) general stabilization improvements. Tasks 4 and 5 are integrated into features 1-3.

verification.summary: All 13 tests pass (pytest 0.07s). Package imports cleanly. All eval runners execute successfully. Review issues resolved: dead code removed, missing tests added, retriever cap fixed, build backend corrected.
